agency.footerNotice: Hello Dreams is a private support structure mainly intended for Tunisian candidates preparing a professional project in Bulgaria. It is neither an embassy, nor a consulate, nor a public administration. The agency does not guarantee hiring, obtaining a visa or any administrative authorization. Final decisions belong to employers, administrations and competent authorities.

items: Assistance preparing the CV and file

values.title: Transparency
values.body: Clear support, without automatic promises or ambiguous messaging about external decisions.

values.title: Method
values.body: Each application moves forward with visible steps, priorities and organized documents.

values.title: Respect for candidates
values.body: We take the time to understand your profile and explain both limits and possibilities.

items.question: Is the service intended for Tunisians?
items.answer: Yes, Hello Dreams mainly supports Tunisian candidates preparing a professional project in Bulgaria.

items.question: Can I apply from Tunisia?
items.answer: Yes, you can send your information from Tunisia through the form or WhatsApp.

items.question: Do you guarantee a job?
items.answer: No. The agency supports candidates and helps guide them toward available opportunities. The final decision always belongs to the employer.

items.question: Do you guarantee the visa?
items.answer: No. Decisions about visas, authorizations and official documents belong only to competent authorities.

items.question: What English level is required?
items.answer: It depends on the role. Some roles require an intermediate level, others require a stronger level. It is important to indicate your real level.

items.question: Is French useful?
items.answer: Yes, some roles may value French, especially in customer service or multilingual roles.

items.question: Do I need a passport?
items.answer: A valid passport may be required for some steps. If you do not have one yet, mention it in your application.

items.question: How do I send my profile?
items.answer: You can fill in the form or send your information directly via WhatsApp at +359888626203.

testimonials.title: Better prepared candidates move forward with more confidence.
testimonials.text: These comments illustrate the kind of support candidates look for: clarity, organization and continuous communication.

items.name: Sarah M.
items.quote: I needed a clear framework. The team helped me understand the steps and present my profile more professionally.

items.name: Yassine B.
items.quote: The follow-up was serious, especially for documents and interview preparation. I always knew the next action.

items.name: Nour E.
items.quote: Communication in Arabic and French reassured me. I moved forward more calmly and with less confusion.

items.title: Website publisher
items.body: The website is published for Hello Dreams, a private support structure mainly intended for Tunisian candidates preparing a professional project in Bulgaria.

items.title: Nature of the service
items.body: The information presented is for guidance purposes. It does not constitute legal advice and does not replace official information from competent authorities.

items.title: Responsibility
items.body: Hello Dreams does not guarantee hiring, a visa, a work authorization or file acceptance.

items.title: Collected data
items.body: Data sent through the form is used only to analyze your request and contact you again.

items.title: Confidentiality
items.body: Personal information should not be shared with third parties without a legitimate basis or explicit agreement.

items.title: Contact
items.body: For any question about your data, contact the agency by email or WhatsApp.
